summary: Phase 2 Community Structure Features Testing. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All 10 frontend feature items verified and passing via Playwright. Tested: Community Guidelines page (/community), NewsPage 'Zkušenosti komunity' category, User Search in navbar.

minor.issue: Duplicate endpoint defined at server.py lines 828 and 1295. FastAPI uses first one (line 828) which is correct. Line 1295 version (no min-chars check, returns all fields, max 20 results) is dead code but should be removed.
Returns 403 Forbidden instead of 401 Unauthorized for unauthenticated requests. Semantically, 401 is more appropriate.

issues: HomePage.js (line 216) has its own internal <footer> with '© 2024 Bloom' (wrong year) that duplicates the Layout footer. This renders TWO footers on the homepage. Layout footer (correct) shows © 2026 with all 4 links. HomePage footer shows only © 2024 with no links.

1_community_page_loads.details: GET /community renders with 'Zásady komunity' H1, all 6 principles, 'Jak nahlásit problém' reporting section, 'O projektu Bloom' section. Publicly accessible without auth.

2_footer_links.details: Layout footer visible on all pages with links: O projektu (/community#about), Zásady komunity (/community), Ochrana soukromí (/community#privacy), Kontakt (mailto:martinasobku@gmail.com). Verified via query_selector_all('footer a, footer nav a') returning 4 links.

3_news_zkusenosti_filter.details: data-testid=news-cat-zkusenosti button found on /news page with text 'Zkušenosti komunity'

4_zkusenosti_note.details: Clicking 'Zkušenosti komunity' shows data-testid=zkusenosti-note with 'Osobní zkušenosti členů komunity.' text

5_users_search_api.details: GET /api/users/search?q=te returns 200 with list of users. Requires auth (403 without token). Empty query and 1-char return []. Min 2 chars required. Max 10 results.

6_search_icon_visible.details: data-testid=user-search-toggle button visible in navbar when logged in

7_search_panel_opens.details: Clicking toggle opens data-testid=user-search-panel with data-testid=user-search-input inside

8_search_shows_results.details: Typing 'te' shows 10 user results with name and location

9_min_2_chars.details: 1-char query 't' shows 0 results. 2-char query 'te' shows 10 results.

10_click_navigates.details: Clicking first search result navigates to /users/{userId} correctly

action_items: MINOR: Remove duplicate /api/users/search endpoint at server.py line 1295 (dead code, first definition at line 828 is used)
MINOR: Fix copyright year in HomePage.js line 216 from '2024' to '2026' to match Layout footer
MINOR: Consider removing the internal <footer> in HomePage.js entirely since Layout already provides a footer with navigation links
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has duplicate @api_router.get('/users/search') at lines 828 and 1295 - the line 1295 version is dead code with less safe behavior (no min-chars check, exposes more user fields, max 20 results, no banned user filter). Should be removed.
server.py is 1617 lines - well above the 700-line file size guideline and should be split into smaller router modules.
seed_data_creation: None - test_create_news_with_zkusenosti_category created and deleted a test news item
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 community features all passing: /community page, NewsPage zkusenosti category, user search in navbar. Known code quality issues: duplicate /users/search endpoint in server.py (lines 828 and 1295) and HomePage.js has its own <footer> with wrong copyright year (2024 vs 2026 in Layout footer). Auth login uses input[type=email]/input[type=password] selectors (no data-testid on auth form). Test base URL: https://profile-hub-228.preview.emergentagent.com
